mapper.select: SELECT m.MENTORING_NUMBER as mentoringNumber, m.MENTOR_NUMBER as mentorNumber, m.SUBJECT_NUMBER as subjectNumber, m.MENTORING_TITLE as mentoringTitle, m.MENTORING_GOAL as mentoringGoal, m.MENTORING_DETAIL as mentoringDetail, m.FILE_NUMBER as fileNumber, f.FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME as fileOriginalName FROM UB_MENTORING m LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON m.FILE_NUMBER = f.FILE_NUMBER WHERE m.MENTORING_NUMBER = #{mentoringNumber}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_NUMBER), 0) + 1 FROM UB_FILE
INSERT ALL INTO UB_FILE ( FILE_NUMBER, FILE_NAME, FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, FILE_PATH ) VALUES ( #{fileNumber}, #{fileOriginalName}, #{fileOriginalName}, #{fileExtension}, #{fileSize}, '/upload/mentoring/' ) INTO UB_MENTORING ( MENTORING_NUMBER, MENTOR_NUMBER, SUBJECT_NUMBER, MENTORING_TITLE, MENTORING_GOAL, MENTORING_DETAIL, FILE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(MENTORING_NUMBER), 0) + 1 FROM UB_MENTORING), #{mentorNumber}, #{subjectNumber}, #{mentoringTitle}, #{mentoringGoal}, #{mentoringDetail}, #{fileNumber}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UB_MENTORING WHERE MENTOR_NUMBER = #{mentorNumber}
SELECT MENTORING_NUMBER FROM UB_MENTORING WHERE MENTOR_NUMBER = #{mentorNumber}
